case_title: LINDA G MONTGOMERY CPA VS. WATT PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (KIT YUEN WATT AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY CPA, LINDA G AS TO DEFENDANT WATT PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-04-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-04-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF LINDA G. MONTGOMERY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WATT PROPERTY MANGEMENT, REPRESENTED BY TIM LAI, MAINTENANCE SUPERVISOR, WEN YEN YUAN, PROPERTY MANAGER, AND JONATHAN KA-CHUN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY CPA, LINDA G RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WATT PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC $1,296.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,361.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL. AS TO DEFENDANT WATT PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC
